commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Sinneth not. See the annotation on chap. iii. 6. (Challoner)
The generation of God preserveth him, (i.e. the grace of adoption, as long as it remains in the soul; see Chap. iii. 9.) and the wicked one (i.e. the devil) toucheth him not. (Witham)
